main.example_pinyin: Wǒ míngtiān qù Běijīng.

main.english: (an expression to change the subject of a conversation or to remind the listener of a new subject) by the way; well, yes

to not have time; to be busy

compounds.english: past; to go over; to pass by

main.english: a modal particle used at the end of a sentence to indicate consultation, suggestion, request, etc.

compounds.english: I heard this movie is very good
